item.title: How to File Taxes in Japan as a Foreigner (2025 Guide)
item.description: Do foreigners need to file taxes in Japan? Yes — here's a simple guide to Japanese income tax, who needs to file, and how to do it.

item.title: How to Get Permanent Residency in Japan (Foreigner's Guide 2025)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to applying for permanent residency in Japan as a foreigner. Requirements, documents, timeline, and tips to improve your chances.

item.title: Types of Work Visa in Japan Explained (2025 Complete Guide)
item.description: A clear explanation of every type of work visa in Japan — Engineer, Tokutei Gino, Skilled Labor, and more. Find out which visa is right for you.

item.title: Best Job Sites for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: The best websites and apps to find a job in Japan as a foreigner. Includes English-friendly sites, bilingual roles, and tips for each platform.

item.title: Best Money Transfer Apps from Japan (Cheap & Fast) 2025
item.description: The cheapest and fastest ways to send money from Japan to the Philippines, Vietnam, Indonesia and other countries. Compare Wise, Revolut, and more.

item.title: Best Private Health Insurance for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: Do you need private health insurance in Japan? Compare the best options for foreigners — what's covered, how much it costs, and who needs it.

item.title: Best SIM Cards for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: The best cheap SIM cards in Japan for foreigners. Compare IIJmio, Mineo, Rakuten and more — no Japanese required to sign up.

item.title: How Japanese Health Insurance Works for Foreigners (2025)
item.description: Confused about health insurance in Japan? This guide explains exactly how it works for foreigners — what's covered, how much you pay, and how to use it.

item.title: How to Change Jobs with a Work Visa in Japan (2025 Guide)
item.description: Can you change jobs on a work visa in Japan? Yes — here's exactly how to do it, what to tell immigration, and how to avoid losing your visa status.

item.title: How to Open a Bank Account in Japan as a Foreigner (2025)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to opening a Japanese bank account as a foreigner. Which banks accept foreigners, what documents you need, and the easiest options.

item.title: How to Renew Your Work Visa in Japan (Step-by-Step Guide 2025)
item.description: A complete step-by-step guide to renewing your work visa in Japan. When to apply, what documents you need, and how long it takes.

item.title: How to Rent an Apartment in Japan as a Foreigner (2025)
item.description: A practical guide to renting an apartment in Japan as a foreigner. What documents you need, which agencies accept foreigners, and how to avoid common problems.

item.title: What Is the My Number Card in Japan? Do You Need It?
item.description: Everything foreigners need to know about Japan's My Number card — what it is, how to get it, and whether you really need one.
